title: Mountain goat on a Glacier Bay cliff
description: A white mountain goat (Oreamnos americanus) navigating a steep rocky cliff face in Glacier Bay National Park. One of the signature wildlife species visible from cruise ships on Glacier Bay day.
alt: A mountain goat jumps across a cliff in Glacier Bay National Park
verifiedBySession: 2026-04-11 — downloaded from nps.gov Glacier Bay wildlife page, visually confirmed
